mapper.insert: INSERT INTO csa_header ( id, doc_no, company, store, supplier_code, supplier_contract, transaction_type, reference_no, reason_code, remark, create_from, status, created_by, released_at, released_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{docNo}, #{company}, #{store}, #{supplierCode}, #{supplierContract}, #{transactionType}, #{referenceNo}, #{reasonCode}, #{remark}, #{createFrom}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{releasedAt}, #{releasedBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
INSERT INTO csa_detail (id, csa_id, item_code, item_name, qty, uom, settlement_decision) VALUES (#{id}, #{csaId}, #{itemCode}, #{itemName}, #{qty}, #{uom}, #{settlementDecision})
mapper.select: SELECT id, doc_no, company, store, supplier_code, supplier_contract, transaction_type, reference_no, reason_code, remark, create_from, status, created_by, released_at, released_by, created_at, updated_at FROM csa_header WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, doc_no, company, store, supplier_code, supplier_contract, transaction_type, reference_no, reason_code, remark, create_from, status, created_by, released_at, released_by, created_at, updated_at FROM csa_header ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT h.id, h.doc_no, h.company, h.store, h.supplier_code, h.supplier_contract, h.transaction_type, h.reference_no, h.reason_code, h.remark, h.create_from, h.status, h.created_by, h.released_at, h.released_by, h.created_at, h.updated_at FROM csa_header h WHERE (#{company} IS NULL OR h.company = #{company}) AND (#{store} IS NULL OR h.store = #{store}) AND (#{transactionType} IS NULL OR h.transaction_type = #{transactionType}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR h.status = #{status}) AND (#{createdBy} IS NULL OR h.created_by = #{createdBy}) AND (#{referenceNo} IS NULL OR h.reference_no = #{referenceNo}) ORDER BY h.created_at DESC
SELECT id, csa_id, item_code, item_name, qty, uom, settlement_decision FROM csa_detail WHERE csa_id = #{csaId} ORDER BY item_code ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE csa_header SET status = #{status}, released_at = #{releasedAt}, released_by = #{releasedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
